title: 硬件是骨头，人工智能是灵魂，数据将它们融为一体。
description: 如果数据无法流通，人工智能可能仍难以摆脱被限制在房间里的命运，而硬件可能只是一个涂了一层科技糖的漂亮外壳。

titleEn: Hardware is the bone, AI is the soul, and data unites them as one.
descriptionZh: 如果数据无法流通，人工智能可能仍难以摆脱被限制在房间里的命运，而硬件可能只是一个涂了一层科技糖的漂亮外壳。
descriptionEn: If data fails to circulate, AI may still struggle to escape the fate of being confined to a room, and hardware might just be a pretty shell coated with a layer of technological sugar.

description: “《神鬼寓言5》的价格远远高于中国程序员一天的工资。每天烧几百万代币写代码已经很节俭了，然后你就看到了几千元的账单。”
titleZh: 克劳德代码随意删除80%提示，人类以《神鬼寓言5》为例：AI行业的“降本”才刚刚开始
titleEn: Claude Code deletes 80% of prompts at will, Anthropic sets an example with Fable 5: The "cost reduction" in the AI industry has only just begun
descriptionZh: “《神鬼寓言5》的价格远远高于中国程序员一天的工资。每天烧几百万代币写代码已经很节俭了，然后你就看到了几千元的账单。”
descriptionEn: "The price of Fable 5 is far higher than a Chinese programmer's daily wage. Burning millions of tokens a day on coding is already very frugal, and then you see a bill of several thousand RMB."

title: 美国银行：Meta出售算力，讲述更好的AI投资回报故事
description: 美国银行认为，Meta 的此举可以以每吉瓦年租金 100 亿至 150 亿美元的价格将多余的计算能力货币化，消除对其 1,450 亿美元资本支出的质疑。
titleZh: 美国银行：Meta出售算力，讲述更好的AI投资回报故事
titleEn: Bank of America: Meta Sells Computing Power to Tell a Better AI Investment Return Story
descriptionZh: 美国银行认为，Meta 的此举可以以每吉瓦年租金 100 亿至 150 亿美元的价格将多余的计算能力货币化，消除对其 1,450 亿美元资本支出的质疑。
descriptionEn: Bank of America believes Meta's move could monetize excess computing power at an annual rental of $10 billion to $15 billion per GW, addressing doubts over its $145 billion capital expenditure. However, Meta still purchases computing power externally from companies like Crusoe, and its self-developed chips lag behind, leaving its resale logic and cloud market competitiveness in question.

title: 三年不懈专注具身智能大脑：若语科技将机器人送入危险角落

descriptionZh: 具身智能的真正价值在于成为人类能力的延伸。
descriptionEn: The true value of embodied intelligence is to become an extension of human capabilities.
